notableEvents.label: Caleb Durbin GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Caleb Durbin grounds into a double play, shortstop José Caballero to first baseman Ben Rice. Marcelo Mayer out at 2nd. Caleb Durbin out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Andruw Monasterio pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andruw Monasterio flies out to right fielder Aaron Judge.

notableEvents.label: José Caballero GIDP
notableEvents.detail: José Caballero grounds into a double play, shortstop Trevor Story to second baseman Marcelo Mayer to first baseman Willson Contreras. Jazz Chisholm Jr. out at 2nd. José Caballero out at 1st.
